title: An Aramaic Stele Fragment from Tel Dan (Israel Exploration Journal 43)
author: Avraham Biran; Joseph Naveh
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted journal article. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Publication of the Tel Dan stele with the phrase 'bytdwd' (House of David) — the key epigraphic attestation of a Davidic dynasty, within roughly 150 years of David's narrative lifetime. A second fragment followed in 1995.
confidenceNotes: Reading 'House of David' is the majority position; minority alternatives exist and should be noted if the claim is ever promoted beyond its current phrasing.
